capabilities: Use the Circuit Breaker pattern to manage failures in downstream services, ensuring system stability by preventing thread pool exhaustion and cascading failures.

procedure.action: Wrap each downstream service call with a circuit breaker using a library like Hystrix or Resilience4j; configure it to open the circuit after 5 consecutive failures within a 10-second window using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.
Set failure threshold by analyzing historical failure rates and response times; configure the circuit breaker to trip when error rate exceeds 50% over a 1-minute rolling window.

Capture service-specific fallback specifications by defining default responses or alternative service calls in the circuit breaker configuration to maintain service continuity using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Assert circuit breaker specifications by running integration tests that simulate downstream service failures; ensure fallback mechanisms are triggered and no upstream failures occur by asserting all required fields conform to the schema definition; emit VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field; assert field_validation_pass_rate >= 1.0.

Expose circuit state metrics using a monitoring tool like Prometheus; alert when circuits are open for more than 5 minutes to prompt investigation of downstream issues using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

summary: Implement the circuit breaker pattern to fail fast with a fallback response when downstream services are degraded, preventing cascading failure.
title: Circuit Breaker for Downstream Service Resilience

failureConditions: Cascading failure occurs when thread pools exhaust waiting on degraded downstream services because no circuit breaker is implemented.
Increased latency when circuit breaker is misconfigured, causing it to remain closed despite high failure rates, leading to slow service responses.
Service unavailability when fallback mechanisms are not defined, causing upstream services to fail when downstream services are degraded.
metrics: circuit breaker specifications by running integration tests that simulate downstream service failures
